name: Peach Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups half & half or coffee cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and halve the peaches.
2. Arrange peach halves in an unbaked pie shell with cut sides down.
3. Mix sugar, flour, and cinnamon with cream until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture over the peaches.
5. Place the pie in a preheated oven at 450 degrees F (232 degrees C).
6. Bake for 10 minutes or until the crust begins to brown.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to moderate heat (350 degrees F or 177 degrees C).
8. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes or until the peaches are tender.
9. Remove from the oven and allow it to cool before serving.
